nodes.name: [REFACTOR] refactor: replace Document type with DocumentSnapshot for improved readonly cont

metadata.author: Chris Sheldrick
metadata.description:
refactor: replace Document type with DocumentSnapshot for improved readonly contract

- Updated presence.ts to use DocumentSnapshot instead of Document for better compatibility with external plugins.
- Introduced DocumentSnapshot interface in core/types.ts to provide a lightweight, readonly representation of documents.
- Modified GraphBuilder to accept an array of DocumentSnapshot instead of Document.
- Adjusted PluginContext methods to return DocumentSnapshot and SearchResultSnapshot, ensuring plugins receive readonly data.
�
